text.message: I think there are no huge spots very equal ones
you all see green's port right?

It’s gonna take me forever to get a city
need to check devs sorry red
Red also has two ports plus a city
Bro stop trying to deflect when you have 7 points
You can get road then why do I have to
ok green is playing another game
You didn’t even ask for a trade
Don’t give green road and arm
Bro I have 2 cards in hand
What do you want me to do
Which u want t9 keep and win
Black why did you embargo me
Yeah cuz I was such a big threat apparently
I was literally never leasing, red always had same or more points than me
But for some reason you thought I was a huge threat
And because u were blocked we mitigate that threat
Red wins with a city anyway doesn’t matter
How many times can I tell you this
